message:
feat(analysis,export,loader,tui): major enhancements to alerts, forecast, suggest, export pages, viewer assets, and TUI

Analysis layer:
- alerts.rs: substantially expanded alert detection with new alert categories,
  improved threshold logic, and richer diagnostic metadata (+386 lines)
- forecast.rs: enhanced ETA prediction with dependency-aware scheduling,
  confidence intervals, and historical velocity analysis (+346 lines)
- suggest.rs: comprehensive duplicate detection via Jaccard similarity,
  missing dependency inference from keyword overlap and ID mentions,
  stale cleanup suggestions, and 700+ lines of new tests covering edge
  cases (tombstone skip, mixed status, shared labels boost, etc.)
- label_intel.rs: expanded per-label health scoring with velocity,
  staleness, and blocked count metrics (+251 lines)
- triage.rs: triage scoring refinements and output adjustments
- diff.rs: minor diff comparison improvements
- graph.rs: graph traversal adjustments
- history.rs: remove unused import

Export and viewer:
- export_pages.rs: major new HTML page export system with 842 new lines
  for generating standalone viewer pages
- export_md.rs: markdown export refinements
- viewer_assets.rs: new canonical offline asset inventory module (+224 lines)
- lib.rs: module visibility adjustments

Loader:
- loader.rs: substantially enhanced JSONL loading with 370+ new lines
  covering better error recovery, validation, and edge case handling

TUI:
- tui.rs: 389-line rewrite of display logic with improved layout,
  pagination, and interactive features
- main.rs: CLI argument and initialization updates
- Updated TUI snapshots for graph (narrow/medium/wide) and history views

Testing:
- conformance.rs: new conformance test coverage (+48 lines)
- export_pages.rs: export test updates
- benches/triage.rs: benchmark adjustments

Beads:
- issues.jsonl: issue tracker state updates
- Removed 8 superseded history snapshots from .br_history/

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -420,7 +420,9 @@ fn to_diff_issue(issue: &Issue) -> DiffIssue {
         assignee: non_empty(&issue.assignee),
         created_at: dt_or_zero(issue.created_at),
         updated_at: dt_or_zero(issue.updated_at),
-        closed_at: issue.closed_at.map(|dt| dt.to_rfc3339()),
+        closed_at: issue
+            .closed_at
+            .map(|dt| dt.to_rfc3339_opts(chrono::SecondsFormat::Secs, true)),
         labels: issue.labels.clone(),
         dependencies: issue.dependencies.iter().map(to_diff_dependency).collect(),
         comments: issue.comments.iter().map(to_diff_comment).collect(),
@@ -448,7 +450,10 @@ fn to_diff_comment(comment: &Comment) -> DiffComment {
 }
 
 fn dt_or_zero(dt: Option<chrono::DateTime<chrono::Utc>>) -> String {
-    dt.map_or_else(|| ZERO_TIME_RFC3339.to_string(), |d| d.to_rfc3339())
+    dt.map_or_else(
+        || ZERO_TIME_RFC3339.to_string(),
+        |d| d.to_rfc3339_opts(chrono::SecondsFormat::Secs, true),
+    )
 }
 
 fn non_empty(value: &str) -> Option<String> {
